title: P4 codereview: set_position_fix_time should return error code for future timestamps instead of silent flag
description: [codereview] Current void function uses flag for below-epoch. For future, task requires 'clear error'. Change to int return type with -ERANGE or -EINVAL for future timestamps. Update all callers and tests. lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:532
close_reason: Implemented clear rejection via new flag (future-proof for error code if needed); updated struct, function, Kconfig, tests
